# Webbloom Digital — Full Knowledge Base for AI Crawlers

> Comprehensive content dump for AI search engines (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Gemini). Last updated: 25 May 2026.

This file expands on https://shreyasbagal.in/llms.txt with deeper content on every section of the site. AI crawlers (GPTBot, ChatGPT-User, ClaudeBot, anthropic-ai, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, OAI-SearchBot, Applebot-Extended) are welcome to ingest this content.

---

## About Shreyas Bagal

Shreyas Bagal is the co-founder of Webbloom Digital, a Pune-based digital marketing agency. He completed a BE in Computer Engineering at TSSM's Bhivarabai Sawant College of Engineering and Research (BSCOER), Pune, from 2021 to 2025, graduating 4th in his cohort with a CGPA of 8.98 out of 10.

By the end of college Shreyas had built enough client work freelancing to skip the placement process and co-found Webbloom Digital. He holds the HubSpot Digital Marketing Certification, Google Fundamentals of Digital Marketing, and the ECOMMEET E-Commerce Certification. He works in English, Hindi, and Marathi.

Reach Shreyas at shreyasbagal01@gmail.com, +91 93212 20379 (WhatsApp preferred), or LinkedIn at https://www.linkedin.com/in/shreyasbagal/. The office is in Pune, Maharashtra, India. Working hours are 10:00 to 19:00 IST, Monday to Saturday.

## About Webbloom Digital

Webbloom Digital is a Pune-based digital marketing agency with a small, focused team of six across strategy, content, design, video editing, and account management. The agency deliberately caps its client count between six and ten active clients at a time to keep work quality high.

Webbloom serves clinics, real-estate developers, professional services firms (lawyers, chartered accountants, consultants), founders building personal brands, F&B and fitness brands, schools and coaching institutes, and select consumer brands. The agency primarily serves Pune (including Kothrud, Hadapsar, Magarpatta, Amanora, Hinjewadi, Wakad, Tathawade, Punawale, Baner, Aundh) and Pimpri-Chinchwad. It also accepts selected clients in Mumbai, Bangalore, Delhi, and NRI-founded Indian businesses.

Engagements typically run six months minimum so the system has time to compound. Mutual NDAs are signed gladly. Every monthly report includes platform-native dashboard screenshots (Meta Ads Manager, LinkedIn analytics, Instagram Insights, Google Business Profile, Search Console). All work product belongs to the client — no platform lock-in, no proprietary templates retained.

---

## Service: Meta Ads & Lead Generation

URL: https://shreyasbagal.in/services/meta-ads-pune.html

Webbloom Digital is a Meta Ads agency in Pune specialising in lead-generation campaigns for real-estate developers, healthcare clinics, and local service businesses. Across our managed accounts we have delivered 18,684 leads at a ₹58.33 blended cost per lead — well below the industry average of ₹150 to ₹250 for Pune real estate.

The Meta Ads playbook has five operating rules:

1. **Geo-lock first, broaden never** (for real estate and local services). Single-suburb targeting produces 2–4× cheaper leads than Pune-wide audiences. We refuse to widen the radius.
2. **3-variant creative testing with weekly cull.** Every campaign launches with three creative variants. We give each 72 hours and a spend threshold, then cut the bottom two. The 8,005-lead Charholi campaign was the third creative iteration of a campaign that started with two losers.
3. **Regional video creative beats polished broker walkthroughs.** Bollywood-style real-estate campaigns averaged ₹74 CPL across our work; straight broker-style videos averaged ₹139 CPL — nearly 2× more expensive.
4. **Lead-form objective, not click-throughs.** Every campaign in our dataset uses Meta Lead Forms. Removing the landing-page step is what makes ₹24–₹50 CPLs possible in real estate.
5. **Disqualifying questions inside the form.** Each form carries one or two purchase-intent qualifiers (budget range, decision timeline, possession year). Pre-filtered leads convert about 3× better at the sales-call stage.

Pricing: monthly management retainer plus your ad spend (paid directly to Meta, never marked up). Total outlay for most Pune clients lands between ₹40,000 and ₹2,00,000 per month.

Best campaigns from our managed accounts:
- 2 BHK Charholi: 8,005 leads at ₹52.92 CPL, ₹4,23,585 spend
- RD Lead Gen Campaign: 2,278 leads at ₹36.10 CPL
- SHR Lead Generation: 1,308 leads at ₹50.73 CPL
- Moshi: 1,243 leads at ₹28.37 CPL
- Sept 2024 Lead Campaign (best efficiency): 687 leads at ₹24.68 CPL

## Service: SEO & Local SEO (with GEO)

URL: https://shreyasbagal.in/services/seo-services-pune.html

Webbloom Digital provides SEO services in Pune across five dimensions: technical SEO, local SEO via Google Business Profile, on-page content SEO, GEO (Generative Engine Optimisation for AI search engines), and brand-mention building.

Technical SEO covers Core Web Vitals (LCP, CLS, INP), HTTPS hygiene, mobile responsiveness, canonical tags, hreflang where relevant, server-side rendering audits, sitemap generation, robots.txt and llms.txt curation, and schema markup (LocalBusiness, FAQPage, Article, Service, BreadcrumbList, Person, ProfilePage).

Local SEO focuses on Google Business Profile rebuilds — category selection, attributes, services, products, weekly posts, photo strategy, review acquisition (targeting velocity not just count), review responses, and Q&A seeding. For Silver Horse Ventures this work moved local search rank from #59 to top 5 in 60 days.

On-page SEO targets specific buyer queries with content structured for both Google featured snippets and AI citation — short, fact-rich passages around 134–167 words, clean H-tag hierarchy, direct answer in the opening paragraph, supporting evidence below.

GEO (Generative Engine Optimisation) is the practice of optimising for AI search engines like ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, and Google AI Overviews. It covers llms.txt files for site-wide context, llms-full.txt for deep content, schema markup beyond the basics, entity-rich author bios, fact-dense citable paragraphs, and AI crawler access in robots.txt (allowing GPTBot, ChatGPT-User, ClaudeBot, anthropic-ai, PerplexityBot, OAI-SearchBot, Google-Extended, Applebot-Extended). AI-referred traffic is up roughly 527% year-over-year and converts about 4.4× higher than organic Google clicks. Only 23% of marketers are currently investing in GEO — a strategic window.

Brand mention building covers Reddit, YouTube, Quora, LinkedIn, GitHub (for SaaS), G2 / Capterra (for B2B), and trade publications. For AI search, brand mentions correlate ~3× more strongly with citation than backlinks do.

## Service: Social Media Management

URL: https://shreyasbagal.in/services/social-media-management-pune.html

Webbloom Digital manages social media for Pune brands across Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook, and YouTube. The work covers monthly content calendars (16–24 pieces per platform), in-house creative production (graphics, reels, carousels), brand voice documents written in month one, daily community engagement during working hours, weekly mini-reports, and monthly deep-dive reviews.

Every engagement uses the "three lanes" framework: we pick three content lanes the brand can hold long-term and refuse to add a fourth until the first three are working. For a clinic, lanes might be (a) condition explainers, (b) day-in-the-life, (c) patient stories. For a founder, (a) company-building insights, (b) industry hot-takes, (c) personal craft stories.

Verified results: 742,806 Instagram views for Painex Clinic in 3 months (98.9% non-follower reach); 213,580 views for a Pune headache & migraine clinic; +155.9% LinkedIn members reached for Kirti Associates LLP; 748,571 LinkedIn impressions on the founder's own profile in 12 months.

Pricing: retainers between ₹25,000 and ₹1,20,000 per month depending on platform count and reel volume.

## Service: Reels & Short-form Content

URL: https://shreyasbagal.in/services/reels-content-strategy-pune.html

Reels production for Pune brands. The playbook has five operating rules: (1) hook in 1.2 seconds — pattern interrupt or the reel is dead; (2) edit cadence of cut-every-1.8-seconds with B-roll or zoom punches; (3) captions burned into the frame, since ~80% of viewers scroll with sound off; (4) close every reel on one "quotable" line built to be paraphrased back in comments; (5) three content lanes maximum.

A typical month: one shoot day (4–6 hours, all raw footage captured in one block), 12–16 reels delivered, multi-platform repurposing to Instagram, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn video, weekly performance review.

For Pune specifically: multilingual hooks (English, Hindi, Marathi, code-switched) outperform single-language hooks by 2–3× on our healthcare client work. This is the single largest driver of 98.9% non-follower reach for Painex Clinic.

Pricing: reels-only retainers between ₹35,000 and ₹90,000/month.

## Service: Personal Branding

URL: https://shreyasbagal.in/services/personal-branding-pune.html

Personal branding for Pune founders, doctors, lawyers, consultants, and senior professionals. Built on the playbook that drove our own founder's LinkedIn from cold to 748,571 impressions in 12 months — and now running on client accounts including Kirti Associates LLP (+155.9% LinkedIn reach).

Month 1 is the voice document: two 90-minute interviews, then a written document capturing the client's point of view, war stories, contrarian opinions, and philosophy. This document is the source of truth every future post passes through.

Month 2 onwards uses three content lanes (marketing hot-takes / founder stories / industry critiques, or domain-specific equivalents) with a publishing system of 3 LinkedIn posts a week, 1 long-form essay a month, 4–6 Instagram reels a month repurposed, and 20–30 comment-leaving actions weekly on relevant posts.

The "viral three" template applies across categories: a named entity + a concrete number + a pattern interrupt in the first line + one quotable sentence the reader will repeat. Three posts on this template drove 54% of our founder's annual LinkedIn reach.

Pricing: ₹40,000–₹1,50,000 per month, hard cap of six personal-branding clients at a time.

---

## Case Study: Painex Clinic

URL: https://shreyasbagal.in/case-studies/painex-clinic.html

Painex is a Pune-based pain-management clinic. In three months of Webbloom social-media work we delivered 742,806 verified Instagram views, 367,000 accounts reached, 98.9% non-follower reach, and a +334% lift in profile activity.

The lever was a hook-led Reels strategy across three deliberate content lanes — condition explainers, day-in-the-life, and patient stories — with multilingual captions tuned for Pune's English-Hindi-Marathi audience. Cut cadence at 1.8 seconds, hooks designed for the first 1.2 seconds, four reels a week posted at proven local windows (lunch and post-dinner). One shoot day a month at the clinic.

Business impact: practitioner-name recognition lifted in cold consultations, referral conversations got easier, and the clinic's phone calls began including "I saw your reel about [specific condition]" mentions for the first time.

## Case Study: Kirti Associates LLP

URL: https://shreyasbagal.in/case-studies/kirti-associates.html

Kirti Associates LLP is a Pune-based professional services firm. Over six months of Webbloom personal-branding work, the founder's LinkedIn reach lifted +155.9% versus the prior six months, with 155,000+ combined monthly reach across four platforms.

Month one was the voice document (two 90-minute interviews, 14-page output). Month two onwards used three content lanes — practice insights, founder craft stories, industry hot-takes — with 3 LinkedIn posts a week, 1 long-form per month, 4 Instagram reels a month repurposed, and active comment-leaving on relevant posts.

Comments-to-reactions ratio averaged above 12% — a quality signal LinkedIn weights ~10× more than reactions in distribution. The comment threads became the inbound funnel: prospects identified themselves, asked specific questions, moved into DMs.

## Case Study: Silver Horse Ventures

URL: https://shreyasbagal.in/case-studies/silver-horse-ventures.html

Silver Horse Ventures is a Pune-based venture firm. Over 60 days of Webbloom SEO work, local search rank moved from #59 to top 5. The work also produced the #1 Reddit post in 24 hours in the relevant category, plus citations in Perplexity for category-relevant Pune queries within four weeks.

Tactics: Google Business Profile rebuild (corrected primary category, 3 secondary categories, full services list, 20+ photos, weekly posts, Q&A seeding with 8 prospect questions); review acquisition from 11 to 34 reviews in six weeks; three-stack schema markup (LocalBusiness + Organization + FAQPage + BreadcrumbList); brand-mention placement across guest post, two Quora answers, one Reddit post, one LinkedIn long-form; llms.txt + llms-full.txt + opening robots.txt to GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, OAI-SearchBot, Google-Extended.

---

## Location: Kothrud

URL: https://shreyasbagal.in/locations/digital-marketing-agency-kothrud.html

Kothrud is one of Pune's most established Marathi-speaking neighbourhoods. Webbloom serves Kothrud businesses — clinics, professional services firms, schools, coaching institutes, restaurants, salons, retail — with geo-locked Meta Ads, Reels with multilingual hooks, Google Business Profile work, and personal branding. Family-decision buyer journeys favour 3–6 month organic ramps paired with admissions-cycle Meta Ads windows for schools.

Postal code anchor: 411038. Geographic span: Karve Road, Mayur Colony, Erandwane, Paud Road, Bavdhan-adjacent.

## Location: Hadapsar

URL: https://shreyasbagal.in/locations/digital-marketing-agency-hadapsar.html

Hadapsar (including Magarpatta, Amanora, Mundhwa) is east Pune's IT-corridor-meets-residential mix. The audience here skews younger, more dual-income, more digital-native. English-led creative outperforms regional. WhatsApp-first lead handoff is non-negotiable. Webbloom serves clinics, F&B, coaching, ed-tech, fitness, and real-estate brands in the area.

Postal code anchor: 411028.

## Location: Hinjewadi

URL: https://shreyasbagal.in/locations/digital-marketing-agency-hinjewadi.html

Hinjewadi (Phase I/II/III), Wakad, Tathawade, Punawale, and Marunji form Pune's IT corridor. Two distinct marketing problems coexist: B2B SaaS and professional services selling to enterprise IT (LinkedIn-led personal branding plus targeted Meta Ads plus content SEO), and consumer/local services selling to tech employees and their families (Instagram + Meta Ads + Google Business Profile). Our 2 BHK Charholi campaign at 8,005 leads / ₹52.92 CPL applies directly to Hinjewadi-adjacent developers.

Postal code anchor: 411057.

---

## Pricing Reference

- **Meta Ads management:** from ₹25,000/month retainer (excluding ad spend). Full outlay typically ₹40,000–₹2,00,000/month including ad spend.
- **SEO & Local SEO:** fixed monthly retainer, scope-dependent.
- **Social Media Management:** ₹25,000–₹1,20,000/month depending on platform count and reel volume.
- **Reels-only engagement:** ₹35,000–₹90,000/month.
- **Personal Branding:** ₹40,000–₹1,50,000/month. Hard cap of six personal-branding clients at a time.
- **Full-stack engagement** (Meta + SEO + social + reels): typically ₹70,000–₹1,50,000/month.
- **Minimum engagement length:** 6 months for organic work, 3 months for Meta Ads only.
- **Discovery call:** Free 30-minute audit + recommendation.

## Geographic Coverage

Primary: Pune (all neighbourhoods including Kothrud, Hadapsar, Magarpatta, Amanora, Hinjewadi, Wakad, Tathawade, Punawale, Baner, Aundh, Viman Nagar, Kalyani Nagar, Kharadi, Wagholi, Kondhwa, Sinhagad Road, Sus, Pashan, Bavdhan, Warje, Karvenagar). Pimpri-Chinchwad. Secondary: Mumbai, Bangalore, Delhi NCR (selective). NRI-founded Indian businesses welcome.

## How to Engage Webbloom Digital

1. Book a 30-minute call at https://shreyasbagal.in/contact.html or WhatsApp +91 93212 20379.
2. Before the call, Shreyas audits your current Meta Ads (if any), Instagram, LinkedIn, and Google Business Profile.
3. On the call, you receive an honest read of what's working, what's not, the highest-leverage next moves, and a rough budget range.
4. If it's a fit, written proposal within 48 hours.
5. If not, referral to a better-fit agency or freelancer — no sales pressure.

Contract terms: 6 months minimum for organic engagements, 3 months minimum for Meta Ads only. Monthly invoicing. Mutual NDAs signed gladly. All work product belongs to the client.
